title: Fun TNT
description: Adds multiple new variants of TNT
body:
# FunTNT: The Explosive Overhaul

**FunTNT** is a Minecraft mod built for **NeoForge** that completely redefines how explosions work in the game. Instead of just cloning vanilla TNT, this mod introduces a massive library of specialized explosives, each engineered with unique tactical behaviors, environmental reactions, and custom mechanics. 

Whether you are looking for surgical mining precision, automated farming utilities, or massive landscape terraforming, FunTNT provides a survival-friendly toolkit to dynamically reshape your world.

---

## Key Features

* **Specialized Explosive Actions:** The mod adds a wide range of explosives that go far beyond standard destruction. Depending on what you craft, detonations can instantly fertilize crops, manipulate the environment, or unleash colossal, biome-level blasts that can even flash-evaporate nearby water into vapor.
* **Premium Mechanical Polish:** Every explosive features its own custom-coded entity renderer, complete with unique high-intensity flashing and scaling "swelling" animations when primed. 
* **Sensitive Redstone Ignition:** Built with advanced neighbor-update logic, these blocks react instantly to direct torch placements, levers, or redstone signals that vanilla blocks might miss.
* **Survival Balanced:** Every item is fully integrated into survival gameplay with thematic recipes designed to encourage resource gathering and natural exploration.
* **Continuous Updates:** Built on a modular framework, the mod is constantly expanding with new explosive archetypes—including gravity-shifting blasts and restorative explosions designed to cleanly "undo" terrain damage.

---

## Credits

* **dazzle_cool** & **city_sands** — Localization & Translations
* **[Free Sounds Library](https://www.freesoundslibrary.com "Free Sounds Library")** — Custom Audio Effects
